comment: Hardware ABI probe. Tests whether two stock LineSel edit handlers update params[5] and params[6] by turning guitar/input level into an audible gain change. No generated oscillator, no fardata, no unknown ctx reads.
fxid_comment: 0x0196, separate from CtxMap so the recovery probe remains stable.

params.name: TapA
params.comment: Expected to land in params[5] via the stock LineSel knob1 edit handler.

params.name: TapB
params.comment: Expected to land in params[6] via the stock LineSel knob2 edit handler.
